# Valparaiso

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Amplificacion Sismica](https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.com/amplificacion-sismica/)
- [Asentamiento Diferencial](https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.com/asentamiento-diferencial/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.com/cimentaciones/)
- [Columnas Grava](https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.com/columnas-grava/)
- [Compresion Simple](https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.com/compresion-simple/)
- [Consolidacion](https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.com/consolidacion/)
- [Drenes Verticales](https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.com/drenes-verticales/)
- [Ensayo Cpt](https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.com/ensayo-cpt/)

## Contact
- Website: https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.com/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
